title: Bridge Essay: What fMRI studies say about the nature of the psychedelic effect: a scoping revi

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Liberation and enlightenment — ego dissolution, self-transcendence, psychedelic-induced mystical experience, spiritual awakening, enlightenment neuroscience.

**What fMRI studies say about the nature of the psychedelic effect: ascoping review.** — Front Neurosci. PMID: 40666257. DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2025.1606798. Research on psychedelic drugs, such as psilocybin, LSD or DMT, is aburgeoning field, with an increasing number of studies showing their promise in treatment of mental disorders as well as examining their mechanism of action. Determining their effect on the brain is crucial from clinical standpoint, but also offers highly promising avenues of advancement in basic neuroscience-functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is one of the most useful techniques to do so, with anumber of newly publis...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 15 (Liberation/Enlightenment). Evaluation: Excellent (score=11.9)
